choices.text: Independent agency investigates accidents, issues probable cause + safety recommendations (no enforcement). FAA regulates + enforces. Just culture + ASRS confidential reporting encourage learning.
<400 ft AGL, daylight + civil twilight, VLOS, <55 lbs, yield to manned. LAANC for controlled airspace. Remote Pilot Cert via FAA exam ($175). Remote ID required 2024+.
Joby (Toyota-backed FAA cert in progress), Archer (Stellantis), Beta, Lilium, EHang. ~100-150 mile range, 4-6 pax. First commercial flights 2025-2026. ~65 dB at 100 ft vs heli 95 dB.
Vertiports: dedicated urban landing pads ($10-50M each), charging, ATC integration. New UAM corridors 200-500 ft, AI traffic management. Active FAA + NASA research.

Drone Part 107 (~$200 cert) lowest barrier; A&P mechanic ($50-100k after 18-mo school); ATC competitive but federal pension; pilot $80-120k training but huge growth. Major pilot shortage = best wages in decade.
